author: feral-core
description: Ask FERAL what it sees through any connected camera — browser share, iOS CameraPermissionAdapter, W610 glasses, or any HUP daemon that advertises a camera capability. Picks the best camera automatically. Always asks the user for permission before capturing, matching the 'with your permission' contract.
trigger_phrases: what is in front of me
show me what the camera sees
can you see what i'm pointing at

endpoints.description: Capture a frame from the best available camera daemon and describe what it contains. Requires user confirmation before the camera actually fires.

params.name: reason
params.description: Human-readable reason the agent needs a frame (shown in the permission prompt).

params.name: node_id
params.description: Override the best-camera picker. Must match a connected HUP daemon node_id.

endpoints.returns_description: Object with frame_id, resolution, data_b64 (JPEG), encoding, and scene_description (natural-language summary).
